habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Puede replegarse en el caparazón y ganar más CA natural mientras permanece inmóvil.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Shell (Ex) As a move action, the turtle can withdraw into its shell. It cannot move or attack while shelled, but its natural armor bonus increases by 4.

fullStatBlock:
CR 1/3
Snapping Turtle
N Tiny animal
Init -1
Senses low-light vision, scent; Perception +5
AC 12, touch 11, flat-footed 12 (-1 Dex, +1 natural, +2 size)
hp 5 (1d8+1)
Fort +3, Ref +1, Will +1
Speed 10 ft., swim 20 ft.
Melee bite +1 (1d3-3)
Space 2 ft.; Reach 0 ft.
Special Abilities Shell (Ex) The turtle can withdraw into its shell as a move action, gaining +4 natural armor but unable to move or attack.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 4, Dex 8, Con 13, Int 1, Wis 13, Cha 6
CMB -3; CMD 4
Feats Weapon Finesse
Skills Perception +5, Swim +5
Environment temperate or warm water or shore
Organization solitary or band (2-5)
Treasure none
Source PFRPG Bestiary 2
